title: Hornet Removal in Melrose, Bronx | $350–$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Melrose, Bronx. Safe elimination of hornet nests from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350–$550 service!
intro: Hornets can pose a serious threat to residents and businesses in Melrose, creating dangerous nesting situations in homes, apartment buildings, and commercial properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout the Melrose neighborhood, ensuring your property is safe from these aggressive stinging insects. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Melrose and the greater Bronx area for years with specialized hornet removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective methods to remove hornet nests from any location, backed by our satisfaction guarantee and transparent pricing of $350–$550.
localContext: Melrose's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, rowhouses, and proximity to green spaces like St. Mary's Park creates ideal conditions for hornet nesting in eaves, attics, and building facades. The neighborhood's dense residential blocks along Melrose Avenue and Third Avenue require experienced pest control professionals who understand the unique challenges of urban hornet removal.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Melrose?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service in Melrose. Our technicians can typically eliminate a hornet nest within 1-2 hours of arrival, depending on the nest size and location. We prioritize emergency calls when hornets pose immediate danger to residents.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350–$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe nest elimination using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, removal of the nest structure, treatment of the area to prevent reinfestation, and a follow-up inspection. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Melrose apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets frequently build nests in Melrose's older apartment buildings, particularly in roof eaves, air conditioning units, fire escapes, and wall voids. The neighborhood's classic Bronx architecture provides many sheltered spots where hornets establish colonies during warm months.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use safe, EPA-approved methods and take all necessary precautions to protect your family and pets during hornet removal. We establish safety perimeters, use protective equipment, and ensure the area is completely safe before completing the service.
